full_text:
Xiahou Lingnü 夏侯令女
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Lingnü (夏侯令女). Married to Cao Wenshu, a relative of Cao Shuang, mutilated herself rather then marry again. Xiahou Lingnü was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
